note: Marketplace plugin FT records for FLOW-34 Mode-B-thin adapters. FT-C1 through FT-C65 cover all 65 plugins from XIIGEN-MARKETPLACE-MASTER-PLAN.md. Wave 1 first: C5 (Canva Text Adapter). FT-ID convention: C = client plugin, numeric = marketplace plan order.

features.name: CanvaTextElementsAdapter
features.description: Adapts the Figma-to-Code CSS generation pipeline for Canva Apps SDK. Reads Canva text elements via @canva/design selection API, maps them through the shared CSS engine (unchanged from Figma plugin), writes enhanced text back to canvas. 90% shared code — only canva-adapter.ts differs.
portingConstraints: Canva text element property names differ from Figma (content vs characters, fontStyle.weight vs fontName.style)
Canva textAlign uses 'start'/'center'/'end' — Figma uses 'LEFT'/'CENTER'/'RIGHT'
Canva color is 0-255 RGB — Figma is 0-1 float RGB
Storage: @canva/app-storage instead of figma.clientStorage
Build: webpack mandatory for Canva sandbox (cannot substitute Vite)

features.name: CanvaSiteGenerator
features.description: Adapts the XIIGen Site Generator for Canva Apps SDK. Reads Canva design elements (text, images, frames, shapes) via @canva/design API, maps them through the shared site generation engine (unchanged from Figma plugin), and exports generated HTML/CSS. 90% shared code — only canva-adapter.ts differs.
portingConstraints: Canva element types use TEXT/IMAGE/FRAME/SHAPE — Figma uses NodeType enum
Canva position is { x, y } on element — Figma uses absoluteTransform matrix
Canva backgroundColor is hex string — Figma uses RGBA 0-1 float
Canva layout is implicit by type — Figma uses layoutMode property
Build: webpack mandatory for Canva sandbox (cannot substitute Vite)

features.name: MiroAIArchitect
features.description: Adapts the XIIGen AI Architect for Miro Apps SDK. Reads Miro board items (cards, shapes, connectors, text, frames) via @mirohq/miro-api, maps them through the shared architecture engine, and writes AI-generated architectural documentation back to the Miro board. New platform — no prior implementation.
portingConstraints: Miro item types use card/connector/shape/text/frame — no shared type system with Figma/Canva
Miro color is hex string via style.fillColor — Figma uses RGBA 0-1 float
Miro position is { x, y } — Figma uses absoluteTransform matrix
Miro geometry (width/height) is separate object — Figma/Canva inline on element
Miro connector endpoints are startItem/endItem { id } refs — no Figma equivalent
Build: webpack mandatory for Miro Apps SDK constraint

features.name: CanvaBackgroundRemover
features.description: FT-C6 — Canva adapter for the XIIGen Background Remover. Reads Canva image elements, sends to AI image processing engine, writes processed images back to canvas.
portingConstraints: Canva images accessed via @canva/design ImageElement — Figma uses ImageNode fill
Canva opacity is 0-1 float on element — consistent with CSS
Build: webpack mandatory for Canva sandbox

features.name: MiroSprintPlanner
features.description: FT-M2 — Miro adapter for the XIIGen Sprint Planner. Reads Miro sprint board items (cards, sticky notes, frames) and generates AI-enhanced sprint plans.
portingConstraints: Miro sprint items use card/sticky_note/frame — no shared sprint domain with other platforms
Status field is custom (todo/in_progress/done) — mapped from Miro tags or content convention
Build: webpack mandatory for Miro Apps SDK

features.name: NotionDocGenerator
features.description: FT-NOT1 — Notion adapter for the XIIGen Document Generator. Reads Notion blocks and generates AI-enhanced documentation. RESEARCH ONLY — Notion App Gallery is invite-only/closed; this adapter cannot be published to a public marketplace.
features.marketplaceNote: Notion App Gallery is invite-only as of 2026. Not a publishable target. Kept as domain reference implementation.
portingConstraints: Notion block types (paragraph/heading_1..3/to_do/bulleted_list_item/image) — no shared type system with Figma/Canva/Miro
Notion headings are separate types (heading_1/2/3) not a level property
Notion uses @notionhq/client (server-side preferred) — browser SDK has CORS limitations
Build: webpack mandatory for Notion Apps SDK
platformIncompatibilities: Notion marketplace is invite-only — cannot publish without direct invitation from Notion

features.name: ShopifyProductCopyGenerator
features.description: FT-S1 — Shopify adapter for the XIIGen Product Copy Generator. Reads Shopify product data (title, description, productType, variants) and generates AI-enhanced copy via the shared engine.
portingConstraints: Shopify products have variants[] and images[] — no shared product model with Canva/Miro/Notion
includePricing derived from variants.length > 0 — not a direct Shopify field
Shopify review timeline 2–4 weeks (FC-28 flag) — build planning buffer
Build: Shopify Polaris + App Bridge React — webpack required

features.name: FramerComponentLibraryGen
features.description: FT-FR1 — Framer adapter for the XIIGen Component Library Generator. Reads Framer component trees (frame/text/svg/image/component) and generates AI-enhanced component names and documentation. (Master plan: FR = Framer prefix. FR1 = Component Library Generator.)
portingConstraints: Framer component types (frame/text/svg/image/component) differ from Figma node types and Canva element types
aspectRatio derived from width/height — not a Framer API field
backgroundColor defaults to #ffffff when absent — Framer allows undefined
Build: webpack mandatory for Framer plugin sandbox

features.name: WebflowAICmsContentPopulator
features.description: FT-WF1 — Webflow adapter for the XIIGen AI CMS Content Populator. Reads Webflow CMS collections (slug, name, fieldData, status) and generates AI-enhanced content via the shared engine. (Master plan: WF = Webflow prefix. WF1 = AI CMS Content Populator.)
portingConstraints: Webflow status is draft/published/archived — mapped to DRAFT/PUBLISHED/ARCHIVED
contentLength and contentTone are editorial defaults — not Webflow CMS fields
fieldData is Record<string,string> — schema depends on CMS collection definition
Build: webpack mandatory for Webflow Apps SDK

features.name: FigmaDesignSystemAuditor
features.description: FT-F3 — Figma adapter for the XIIGen Design System Auditor. Reads Figma design tokens (components, text styles, color fills) and generates AI-powered audit results including violation detection and scoring. New platform — Figma Plugin API.
portingConstraints: Figma fills are RGBA 0-1 float — must convert to hex for shared engine
Figma fontName is { family, style } object — not a single string
fontSize undefined for non-text nodes — defaults to 0 in shared style
Figma RECTANGLE maps to SHAPE (no RECTANGLE in shared type system)
Build: webpack mandatory for Figma Plugin API sandbox

features.name: CanvaAIBgSceneGenerator
features.description: FT-C2 — Canva adapter for the XIIGen AI Background Scene Generator. Reads Canva scene elements (image/shape/text/group) and generates AI-enhanced background scenes via text-to-image prompt.
portingConstraints: Canva IMAGE → BACKGROUND, SHAPE → DECORATION, GROUP → OVERLAY in shared type system
position is { x, y } nested — flattened to x/y in shared element
backgroundColor undefined when no fill — defaults to #ffffff in shared style
Build: webpack mandatory for Canva sandbox

features.name: ChromeAIPageAnalyzer
features.description: FT-CH1 — Chrome extension adapter for the XIIGen AI Page Analyzer. Reads DOM elements from the current browser page and generates AI-powered accessibility and UX analysis. New platform — Chrome Extension Manifest V3.
portingConstraints: DOM tagName used as-is (uppercase) — must normalize when matching shared types
contentDensity inferred from textContent.length — no direct DOM API equivalent
importance inferred from H1/BUTTON vs H2/A vs P — heuristic, not semantic
Chrome MV3: service worker context limits DOM access — content script required
Build: webpack mandatory for Chrome extension bundling

features.name: GoogleWSMeetingSummaryGen
features.description: FT-G2 — Google Workspace adapter for the XIIGen Meeting Summary Generator. Reads meeting agenda/action/decision items and generates AI-enhanced summaries with follow-up tracking. New platform — Google Workspace Add-ons.
portingConstraints: Google Workspace item types (agenda_item/action_item/decision/note/attendee) — no shared meeting model with other platforms
requiresFollowUp derived from status=open on action_item — not a Google API field
priority inferred from item type — heuristic
Build: webpack mandatory for Google Workspace Add-on bundling

features.name: WixAltTextGenerator
features.description: FT-W2 — Wix adapter for the XIIGen Alt-Text Generator. Reads Wix image components (WPhoto/SlideShowGallery/MatrixGallery) and generates AI-enhanced accessibility alt-text. New platform within Wix (W prefix).
portingConstraints: Wix component types (WPhoto/SlideShowGallery/MatrixGallery/WRichText) — unique to Wix, no shared image model with Canva/Figma
altLength inferred from image width — heuristic (≥1200=detailed, ≥600=medium, <600=short)
tone inferred from component type — PHOTO=functional, GALLERY=descriptive, WRichText=decorative
Build: webpack mandatory for Wix App Market extensions

features.name: FigmaFlowRouter
features.description: FT-F-FLOW — Figma adapter for XIIGen Flow Router. Reads Figma diagram nodes (RECTANGLE/ELLIPSE/POLYGON/CONNECTOR) and maps to SharedFlowNode (START/STEP/DECISION/END/CONNECTOR). FLOW family: diagram to system.
portingConstraints: Figma shape types (RECTANGLE/ELLIPSE/POLYGON/CONNECTOR) - Figma Plugin API specific
ELLIPSE name heuristic: name.toLowerCase().includes("start") -> START else END
Name ending "?" heuristic -> DECISION (applies to RECTANGLE nodes)

features.name: MiroFlowRouter
features.description: FT-M-FLOW — Miro adapter for XIIGen Flow Router. Reads Miro board items (card/shape/connector/sticky_note) and maps to SharedFlowNode. FLOW family: diagram to system.
portingConstraints: Miro REST API item types: card/shape/connector/sticky_note
shape+diamond -> DECISION; shape+circle+content("start") -> START; shape+circle -> END
startItem.id -> fromId; endItem.id -> toId

features.name: WebflowFlowRouter
features.description: FT-WF-FLOW — Webflow adapter for XIIGen Flow Router. Reads Webflow page hierarchy (static/collection/folder/utility) and maps to SharedFlowNode. FLOW family: page-hierarchy to content-flow.
portingConstraints: Webflow page types: static/collection/folder/utility
slug="/" -> START; type=utility -> END; type=collection -> DECISION; static/folder -> STEP
SharedFlowNode extended with optional slug field for URL preservation

features.name: N8nAutoBuilder
features.description: FT-N-AUTO — n8n adapter for XIIGen Auto-Builder. Reads n8n workflow node specs and maps to SharedWorkflowStep (TRIGGER/ACTION/CONDITION/TRANSFORM/OUTPUT). AUTO family: text to workflow.
portingConstraints: n8n types: trigger/http_request/code/filter/merge/set/webhook/schedule
no nextNodeIds (empty or undefined) -> OUTPUT type
http_request/code/webhook -> requiresConfig:true; filter/merge/set -> requiresConfig:false

features.name: ChromeAutoBuilder
features.description: FT-CH-AUTO — Chrome extension adapter for XIIGen Auto-Builder. Reads Chrome automation actions and maps to SharedWorkflowStep. AUTO family: page-analysis to browser-automation.
portingConstraints: Chrome action types: click/fill/navigate/scroll/extract/wait/screenshot
navigate -> TRIGGER (isEntryPoint:true); extract -> TRANSFORM; screenshot -> OUTPUT
readAutomationActions sorts actions by order field before processing
fill/navigate -> requiresConfig:true; click/scroll/wait/screenshot -> false

features.name: MondayAITaskEnhancer
features.description: FT-MON1 — monday.com adapter for XIIGen AI Task Enhancer. Reads board items and maps to SharedTaskElement with status/priority normalization. UTILITY family.
portingConstraints: monday.com status text values (Done/Working on it/Stuck) - not standardized; unmapped -> TODO
priority field: critical/high/medium/low (lowercase) -> CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW
taskType always TASK; isOverdue requires dueDate field

features.name: AtlassianJiraIssueEnhancer
features.description: FT-A1 — Atlassian Jira adapter for XIIGen AI Issue Enhancer. Reads Jira Cloud issues and maps to SharedIssueElement with priority/status/type normalization. UTILITY family.
portingConstraints: Jira issue types: Bug/Story/Task/Epic/Sub-task -> BUG/STORY/TASK/EPIC/SUBTASK
Priority: Highest->CRITICAL, High->HIGH, Medium->MEDIUM, Low/Lowest->LOW
Status: To Do->TODO, In Progress->IN_PROGRESS, In Review->IN_REVIEW, Done->DONE

features.name: StripePaymentIntelligence
features.description: FT-ST1 — Stripe adapter for XIIGen Payment Intelligence. Reads Stripe payment events and maps to SharedPaymentElement with status/type normalization. UTILITY family.
portingConstraints: Stripe event types: charge/subscription/invoice/payment_intent/customer -> PAYMENT/SUBSCRIPTION/INVOICE/INTENT/CUSTOMER
subscription type -> isRecurring:true; all others -> false
Amounts in cents (integer); currency lowercase (usd/eur)

features.name: GoogleWorkspaceDocsWriter
features.description: FT-G1 — Google Workspace adapter for XIIGen Docs AI Writer. Reads Google Docs paragraph elements and maps to SharedDocParagraph with type/alignment normalization. UTILITY family.
portingConstraints: Google Docs types: heading1/heading2/heading3/title/paragraph/list_item
Alignment: START->LEFT, END->RIGHT; CENTER and JUSTIFIED pass through
fontSize: title=36, heading1=24, heading2=20, heading3=16, paragraph/list_item=12
